---
title: "Untitled"
format: html
---


```{python}
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as patches
from matplotlib import rcParams
from pathlib import Path
 
plt.style.use("dark_background")
rcParams.update({
    "axes.facecolor":   "#111111",
    "figure.facecolor": "#111111",
    "axes.edgecolor":   "#333333",
    "grid.color":       "#222222",
    "text.color":       "white",
    "axes.labelcolor":  "white",
    "xtick.color":      "white",
    "ytick.color":      "white",
    "font.family":      "monospace",
})
 
OUTPUT = Path("output")
OUTPUT.mkdir(exist_ok=True)
 
COLORS = {
    "Pitcher": "#FF6B6B",
    "Catcher": "#00BFFF",
    "Batter":  "#98FB98",
    "ST":      "#FFD700",
    "RS":      "#00BFFF",
}
 
```


```{python}
roles   = ["Pitcher", "Catcher", "Batter"]
seasons = ["Spring Training", "Regular Season"]
x       = np.arange(len(roles))
w       = 0.35
s_colors = [COLORS["ST"], COLORS["RS"]]
 
def get_val(df, role, season, col):
    row = df[(df["role"] == role) & (df["season"] == season)]
    return row[col].values[0] if len(row) > 0 else 0
 
def bar_labels(ax, bars, fmt="{:.0f}"):
    for bar in bars:
        h = bar.get_height()
        if abs(h) > 0.001:
            ax.text(
                bar.get_x() + bar.get_width() / 2,
                h + (0.01 if h >= 0 else -0.04),
                fmt.format(h),
                ha="center", va="bottom" if h >= 0 else "top",
                fontsize=8, color="white"
            )
```

```{python}
def load(path, role, season):
    df = pd.read_csv(path, low_memory=False)
    df["role"]   = role
    df["season"] = season
    return df
 
lb = pd.concat([
    load("data/abs_pitcher_rs.csv", "Pitcher", "Regular Season"),
    load("data/abs_pitcher_st.csv", "Pitcher", "Spring Training"),
    load("data/abs_catcher_rs.csv", "Catcher", "Regular Season"),
    load("data/abs_catcher_st.csv", "Catcher", "Spring Training"),
    load("data/abs_batter_rs.csv",  "Batter",  "Regular Season"),
    load("data/abs_batter_st.csv",  "Batter",  "Spring Training"),
], ignore_index=True)
 
# Summary by role + season
summary = lb.groupby(["role", "season"]).agg(
    players        = ("entity_name",   "count"),
    total_chal     = ("n_challenges",  "sum"),
    total_overturn = ("n_overturns",   "sum"),
    total_exp      = ("exp_chal",      "sum"),
    total_net_for  = ("net_for",       "sum"),
    total_k_flip   = ("n_strikeouts_flip", "sum"),
    total_bb_flip  = ("n_walks_flip",  "sum"),
).reset_index()
 
summary["overturn_rate"] = summary["total_overturn"] / summary["total_chal"]
summary["chal_vs_exp"]   = summary["total_chal"] - summary["total_exp"]
 
print(summary[[
    "role","season","total_chal","overturn_rate","chal_vs_exp","total_net_for"
]].round(3).to_string(index=False))
```


```{python}
fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(9, 6))
 
for i, (season, color) in enumerate(zip(seasons, s_colors)):
    vals = [get_val(summary, r, season, "total_chal") for r in roles]
    bars = ax.bar(x + (i - 0.5) * w, vals, w,
                  label=season, color=color, alpha=0.85)
    bar_labels(ax, bars)
 
ax.set_xticks(x)
ax.set_xticklabels(roles, fontsize=12)
ax.set_ylabel("Total Challenges", fontsize=11)
ax.set_title(
    "Total ABS Challenges by Role\nSpring Training vs. Regular Season 2026",
    fontsize=13, pad=12
)
ax.legend(fontsize=10, framealpha=0.2)
ax.grid(axis="y", alpha=0.15)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig(OUTPUT / "lb_01_total_challenges.png", dpi=300,
            bbox_inches="tight", facecolor="#111111")
plt.show()
print("Saved: lb_01_total_challenges.png")
```

# Overturn Rate by Role
```{python}
fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(9, 6))
 
for i, (season, color) in enumerate(zip(seasons, s_colors)):
    vals = [get_val(summary, r, season, "overturn_rate") for r in roles]
    bars = ax.bar(x + (i - 0.5) * w, vals, w,
                  label=season, color=color, alpha=0.85)
    bar_labels(ax, bars, fmt="{:.1%}")
 
ax.axhline(0.5, color="white", linestyle="--", alpha=0.3, linewidth=1)
ax.text(2.5, 0.515, "50% baseline", fontsize=8, color="white", alpha=0.4)
ax.set_xticks(x)
ax.set_xticklabels(roles, fontsize=12)
ax.set_ylabel("Overturn Rate", fontsize=11)
ax.yaxis.set_major_formatter(
    plt.FuncFormatter(lambda y, _: f"{y:.0%}")
)
ax.set_ylim(0, 1.05)
ax.set_title(
    "Challenge Overturn Rate by Role\nAre pitchers worse at knowing when to challenge?",
    fontsize=13, pad=12
)
ax.legend(fontsize=10, framealpha=0.2)
ax.grid(axis="y", alpha=0.15)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig(OUTPUT / "lb_02_overturn_rate.png", dpi=300,
            bbox_inches="tight", facecolor="#111111")
plt.show()
print("Saved: lb_02_overturn_rate.png")
```

# Challenge Volume vs. Expected
```{python}
 
fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(9, 6))
 
for i, (season, color) in enumerate(zip(seasons, s_colors)):
    vals = [get_val(summary, r, season, "chal_vs_exp") for r in roles]
    bars = ax.bar(x + (i - 0.5) * w, vals, w,
                  label=season, color=color, alpha=0.85)
    bar_labels(ax, bars, fmt="{:+.1f}")
 
ax.axhline(0, color="white", linestyle="--", alpha=0.3, linewidth=1)
ax.set_xticks(x)
ax.set_xticklabels(roles, fontsize=12)
ax.set_ylabel("Actual − Expected Challenges", fontsize=11)
ax.set_title(
    "Actual vs. Expected Challenges by Role\n"
    "Positive = over-challenging | Negative = under-challenging",
    fontsize=13, pad=12
)
ax.legend(fontsize=10, framealpha=0.2)
ax.grid(axis="y", alpha=0.15)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig(OUTPUT / "lb_03_actual_vs_expected.png", dpi=300,
            bbox_inches="tight", facecolor="#111111")
plt.show()
print("Saved: lb_03_actual_vs_expected.png")
 
```

# Strikeouts and Walks Flipped


```{python}
fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 2, figsize=(14, 6), sharey=False)
 
for ax, col, title, ylabel in zip(
    axes,
    ["total_k_flip",  "total_bb_flip"],
    ["Strikeouts Flipped\n(Ball → Strike 3)", "Walks Flipped\n(Strike → Ball 4)"],
    ["Strikeouts Saved", "Walks Prevented"]
):
    for i, (season, color) in enumerate(zip(seasons, s_colors)):
        vals = [get_val(summary, r, season, col) for r in roles]
        bars = ax.bar(x + (i - 0.5) * w, vals, w,
                      label=season, color=color, alpha=0.85)
        bar_labels(ax, bars)
 
    ax.set_xticks(x)
    ax.set_xticklabels(roles, fontsize=11)
    ax.set_ylabel(ylabel, fontsize=10)
    ax.set_title(title, fontsize=12, pad=8)
    ax.legend(fontsize=9, framealpha=0.2)
    ax.grid(axis="y", alpha=0.15)
 
fig.suptitle(
    "Concrete Outcomes from Challenges by Role — 2026",
    fontsize=14, y=1.02
)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig(OUTPUT / "lb_05_flipped_outcomes.png", dpi=300,
            bbox_inches="tight", facecolor="#111111")
plt.show()
print("Saved: lb_05_flipped_outcomes.png")
```

# Catcher Run Saved
```{python}
catcher_rs = lb[
    (lb["role"] == "Catcher") &
    (lb["season"] == "Regular Season") &
    (lb["n_challenges"] >= 3)
].copy()
 
fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10, 7))
 
sc = ax.scatter(
    catcher_rs["n_challenges"],
    catcher_rs["rate_overturns"],
    c=catcher_rs["net_for"],
    cmap="RdYlGn", vmin=-3, vmax=8,
    s=80, alpha=0.9, edgecolors="white", linewidths=0.3
)
 
for _, row in catcher_rs.iterrows():
    ax.annotate(
        row["entity_name"].split(",")[0],
        (row["n_challenges"], row["rate_overturns"]),
        fontsize=7, alpha=0.75,
        xytext=(5, 3), textcoords="offset points"
    )
 
ax.axhline(0.5, color="white", linestyle="--", alpha=0.3, linewidth=1)
ax.text(catcher_rs["n_challenges"].max() * 0.95, 0.515,
        "50% baseline", fontsize=8, color="white", alpha=0.4, ha="right")
 
cbar = plt.colorbar(sc, ax=ax)
cbar.set_label("Net Run Value", fontsize=10)
 
ax.set_xlabel("Number of Challenges", fontsize=11)
ax.set_ylabel("Overturn Rate", fontsize=11)
ax.yaxis.set_major_formatter(plt.FuncFormatter(lambda y, _: f"{y:.0%}"))
ax.set_title(
    "Catcher Challenge Quality — Regular Season 2026\n"
    "Color = Net Run Value | Min. 3 challenges",
    fontsize=13, pad=12
)
ax.grid(alpha=0.12)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig(OUTPUT / "lb_06_catcher_scatter.png", dpi=300,
            bbox_inches="tight", facecolor="#111111")
plt.show()
print("Saved: lb_06_catcher_scatter.png")
```


```{python}
plt.style.use("dark_background")
Path("output").mkdir(exist_ok=True)
 
df = pd.read_csv("data/pbp.csv", low_memory=False)
df = df[df["plate_x"].between(-3, 3) & df["plate_z"].between(0, 6)].copy()
df["is_strike"] = (df["description"] == "called_strike").astype(int)
 
PLATE_HALF = 0.7083
x_bins     = np.linspace(-2, 2, 17)
z_bins     = np.linspace(0.5, 5, 19)
 
 
def make_grid(data):
    grid = np.full((len(z_bins)-1, len(x_bins)-1), np.nan)
    for i in range(len(z_bins)-1):
        for j in range(len(x_bins)-1):
            cell = data[
                data["plate_x"].between(x_bins[j], x_bins[j+1]) &
                data["plate_z"].between(z_bins[i], z_bins[i+1])
            ]
            if len(cell) >= 5:
                grid[i, j] = cell["is_strike"].mean()
    return grid
 
 
def add_zone(ax):
    ax.add_patch(patches.Rectangle(
        (-PLATE_HALF, 1.5), PLATE_HALF * 2, 2.0,
        linewidth=1.5, edgecolor="white", facecolor="none", linestyle="--"
    ))
plt.show()
```

# Count State Plot
```{python}
counts = [(0,0,"0-0"), (0,2,"0-2"), (3,0,"3-0"), (3,2,"3-2")]
 
fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 4, figsize=(16, 5), sharey=True)
fig.suptitle("Called Strike Rate by Zone — Key Counts", fontsize=14, y=1.02)
 
for ax, (b, s, label) in zip(axes, counts):
    sub = df[(df["balls"] == b) & (df["strikes"] == s)]
    im  = ax.pcolormesh(x_bins, z_bins, make_grid(sub),
                        cmap="RdYlGn", vmin=0, vmax=1, shading="flat")
    add_zone(ax)
    ax.set_title(f"{label}  (n={len(sub):,})", fontsize=11)
    ax.set_xlabel("Horizontal (ft)", fontsize=9)
    ax.set_xlim(-2, 2)
    ax.set_ylim(0.5, 5)
    ax.set_xticks([-1, 0, 1])
 
axes[0].set_ylabel("Vertical (ft)", fontsize=10)
axes[0].set_yticks([1.5, 2.5, 3.5, 4.5])
 
fig.text(0.92, 0.75, "100%\nstrike", ha="center", fontsize=8, color="#66BB66")
fig.text(0.92, 0.50, "50%", ha="center", fontsize=8, color="#BBBB44")
fig.text(0.92, 0.25, "0%\nball", ha="center", fontsize=8, color="#BB4444")
 
plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig("output/zone_counts.png", dpi=300,
            bbox_inches="tight", facecolor="#111111")
plt.show()
print("Saved: output/zone_counts.png")
```

# Score differential plot
```{python}
df["score_bucket"] = pd.cut(
    df["bat_score_diff"],
    bins=[-np.inf, -3, -1, 1, 3, np.inf],
    labels=["Down 4+", "Down 1-3", "Tied", "Up 1-3", "Up 4+"]
)
 
fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 5, figsize=(20, 5), sharey=True)
fig.suptitle("Called Strike Rate by Zone — Score Differential (Batting Team)",
             fontsize=14, y=1.02)
 
for ax, bucket in zip(axes, ["Down 4+", "Down 1-3", "Tied", "Up 1-3", "Up 4+"]):
    sub = df[df["score_bucket"] == bucket]
    im  = ax.pcolormesh(x_bins, z_bins, make_grid(sub),
                        cmap="RdYlGn", vmin=0, vmax=1, shading="flat")
    add_zone(ax)
    ax.set_title(f"{bucket}\nn={len(sub):,}", fontsize=11)
    ax.set_xlabel("Horizontal (ft)", fontsize=9)
    ax.set_xlim(-2, 2)
    ax.set_ylim(0.5, 5)
    ax.set_xticks([-1, 0, 1])
 
axes[0].set_ylabel("Vertical (ft)", fontsize=10)
axes[0].set_yticks([1.5, 2.5, 3.5, 4.5])
 
fig.text(0.92, 0.75, "100%\nstrike", ha="center", fontsize=8, color="#66BB66")
fig.text(0.92, 0.50, "50%", ha="center", fontsize=8, color="#BBBB44")
fig.text(0.92, 0.25, "0%\nball", ha="center", fontsize=8, color="#BB4444")
 
plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig("output/zone_score_diff.png", dpi=300,
            bbox_inches="tight", facecolor="#111111")
plt.show()
print("Saved: output/zone_score_diff.png")
```

# Pitcher Rate
```{python}
pitchrs = pd.read_csv("data/abs_pitcher_rs.csv")
pitchst = pd.read_csv("data/abs_pitcher_st.csv")

pitchrs["season"] = "Regular Season"
pitchst["season"] = "Spring Training"

pitchers = pd.concat([pitchrs, pitchst], ignore_index=True)

print(pitchers[[
    "entity_name", "season", "n_challenges", "rate_overturns"
]].sort_values(["season", "n_challenges"], ascending=[True, False]).to_string(index=False))
```


```{python}
pitchers['n_challenges'].groupby(pitchers['entity_name']).max().sort_values(ascending=False).head(10)
```


```{python}
print(catchers[catchers["n_challenges"] > 3][[
    "entity_name", "season", "n_challenges", "rate_overturns"
]].sort_values(["season", "rate_overturns"], ascending=[True, False]).to_string(index=False))
```

# Graph of Top Catchers by Overturn Rate
